task: Convert apex-agent.service from 30-minute scheduled loop to reactive queue-triggered service

1_step1_findings_before_changes.report: Main block: lines 293-294 single run_cycle() call, no loop. run_cycle() gathers state via PostgreSQL, checks blocked status + cooldown, calls Claude Sonnet, executes actions. Queue path: currently reads from PostgreSQL tables, NOT from /home/agentuser/apex/shared/queue/ (added in rewrite). Signal handlers: NONE present before rewrite.

2_main_block_rewritten.details: New main block: while running loop with 10-second sleep interval. Checks /home/agentuser/apex/shared/queue for .json files. Calls run_cycle() only when status=='pending' found. Marks task done after completion. Idle logging every 60 checks (10 minutes).

3_sigterm_sigint_handlers.details: Added signal.signal(signal.SIGTERM, handle_shutdown) and signal.signal(signal.SIGINT, handle_shutdown). Global 'running' flag controls while loop. Logs 'shutdown signal — stopping gracefully' on TERM/INT.

4_run_cycle_only_on_pending.details: run_cycle() only called when pending task found in queue (task.get('status') == 'pending'). Zero API calls when queue is empty.

6_zero_api_when_idle.details: Agent sleeps 10s in loop when queue is empty. make_claude_call() only invoked inside run_cycle(), which is only called when pending task exists. Zero tokens consumed during idle.

8_service_restart.note: Service restart requires elevated sudo permissions. Telegram sessions do not have sudo available. Current status: inactive (dead) since Fri 2026-04-10 16:10:09 UTC. Manually restart with: sudo systemctl restart apex-agent.service

9_service_running_after_30s.instruction: After sudo restart: sleep 30 && systemctl status apex-agent.service --no-pager | grep Active

10_log_confirms_reactive_mode.expected_log_line: APEX agent starting in reactive queue-triggered mode (v2)

changes_made.new_implementation: Lines 293-356: Persistent daemon with signal handlers, queue directory monitoring, 10-second check interval, idle logging throttle (every 10 minutes), graceful SIGTERM/SIGINT shutdown

next_steps: 1. Run on droplet: sudo systemctl restart apex-agent.service
2. Verify with: systemctl status apex-agent.service --no-pager | grep Active
3. Wait 30s and re-check: sleep 30 && systemctl status apex-agent.service
4. Confirm logs show reactive mode: tail -20 /home/agentuser/apex/logs/agent.log
5. Inject test task to /home/agentuser/apex/shared/queue/test.json with status='pending' to verify agent wakes and processes
git_cleanup: Delete result_v95.json from main branch after this commit
